```mjs title=main.mjs
import * as __rspack_external_fs from "fs";
import { readFile } from "fs";

// fs?f137

// ./lib.js


// fs?303b

// ./lib2.js



// ./index.js



it('should not have duplicate import identifiers', async () => {
	expect(readFile).toBeDefined()
	expect(__rspack_external_fs).toBeDefined()
	expect(__rspack_external_fs.readFile).toBe(readFile)
})

export {};

```
